translate-desc: [[Special:Translate|Bogga gaarka ah]] ee lagu turjumo MediaWiki iyo wax ka badan
translate-fuzzybot-desc:
Kani waa akoon nidaam gaar ah oo ay isticmaasho [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Extension:Translate kordhinta Translate] ee MediaWiki, taas oo loo isticmaalo dayactirka turjumaadaha.
Akoonkan waa qayb ka mid ah software-ka MediaWiki mana laha isticmaale gaar ah.
translate-taction-disabled: Tallaabadaan waxay naafu ku tahay wiki-ga.
translate-page-no-such-language: Luuqadda la cayimay waxay ahayd mid khaldan.
translate-page-no-such-group: Kooxda la cayimay waxay ahayd mid khaldan.
translate-page-disabled: Turjumaada luuqadan ee kooxdan waa la joojiyay. Sababta: $1
translate-language-disabled: Turjumaadda luqadaan waa mid howlgab laga dhigay.
translate-page-showing: Soo bandhigista ka bilaabata $1 ilaa $2 ee $3.
translate-page-showing-none: Wax qoraal ah lama soo bandhigin.
translate-page-description-hasoptional:
Kooxdan farriimaha waxa ku jira farriimo ikhtiyaari ah.
Farriimaha ikhtiyaariga ah waa in la turjumaa oo keliya marka luuqaddaadu leedahay baahiyo gaar ah,
sida inaan la isticmaalin kala-bannaan ama la qoro magacyada gaarka ah qaab dhawaaqeedkooda. $1
translate-edit-no-information: Fariintani ma laha sharaxaad. Haddii aad taqaan meesha ama sida fariintan loo adeegsado, waxaad caawin kartaa turjumayaasha kale adigoo ku daraya sharaxaadda fariintan.
translate-edit-warnings: Digniino ku saabsan turjumaado aan dhammaystirnayn
translate-edit-nopermission: Waxaad u baahan tahay xuquuq turjumaad si aad u turjunto fariimaha.
translate-export-format-notsupported: Qaabka dhoofinta ee la cayimay ma taageerto kooxdan farriimaha.
translate-export-format-file-empty: Ma jiraan farriimo la dhoofin karo.
translate-export-group-too-large: Kooxda farriimaha ee la doortay aad bay u weyn tahay. Dooro koox farriimo oo leh wax ka yar $1 {{PLURAL:$1|farriin|farriimo}} ama la xiriir maamulaha turjumaadda si aad talo uga hesho.
translate-checks-parameters: {{PLURAL:$2|Hal cabbir|Cabbirrada soo socda}} ayaa aan la isticmaalin: $1
translate-checks-parameters-unknown: {{PLURAL:$2|Hal cabbir|Cabbirrada soo socda}} ayaa aan la aqoon: $1
translate-checks-balance: Waxaa jira tiro aan is le’egayn oo {{PLURAL:$2|qawska|qowsyo}}: $1
translate-checks-links: {{PLURAL:$2|Xiriiriyahan soo socda ayaa|Xiriiriyayaashan soo socda ayaa}} dhibaato leh: $1
translate-checks-links-missing: {{PLURAL:$2|Xiriiriyahan soo socda ayaa|Xiriiriyayaashan soo socda ayaa}} maqan: $1
translate-checks-plural: Qeexitaanka wuxuu adeegsadaa <nowiki>{{PLURAL:}}</nowiki> laakiin tarjumaaddu ma adeegsato.
translate-checks-plural-forms: <nowiki>{{PLURAL:}}</nowiki> waxaa la siiyay {{PLURAL:$1|hal qaab|$1 qaabab}} laakiin {{PLURAL:$2|hal qaab kaliya ayaa la taageeraa|$2 qaabab ayaa la taageeraa}} (marka laga reebo 0= iyo 1=).
translate-checks-plural-dupe: <nowiki>{{PLURAL:}}</nowiki> wuxuu leeyahay qaabab isku mid ah dhammaadka. <nowiki>{{PLURAL:$1|ido|ido}}</nowiki> waa in loo qoraa <nowiki>{{PLURAL:$1|ido}}</nowiki>.
translate-checks-gettext-plural-count: <nowiki>{{PLURAL:GETTEXT|}}</nowiki> waxay aqbashaa si sax ah $1 {{PLURAL:$1|qaab jamac|qaabab jamac}}. Hadda $2 {{PLURAL:$2|qaab jamac ayaa la bixiyay|qaabab jamac ayaa la bixiyay}}.
translate-checks-smartformat-plural-miss: Tarjumaadani waa inay lahaataa jamac doorsoome ah $1.
translate-checks-smartformat-plural-unsu: Fariintani ma taageerto jamac  ku saabsan doorsoome $1.
translate-checks-smartformat-plural-coun: Tirada qaababka jamac ee ku jira $3 waa khalad. Waa inay lahaataa $1 {{PLURAL:$1|qaab jamac|qaabab jamac}}. Hadda $2 {{PLURAL:$2|qaab jamac|qaabab jamac}} ayaa la bixiyay.
translate-checks-unicode-plural-invalid: Qaababka jamac waa in lagu qeexaa $1. Turjumaaddani waxay ka kooban tahay $2.
translate-checks-pagename: Meel magaca ayaa laga beddelay qeexitaanka
translate-checks-format: Tarjumaaddani ma raacdo qeexitaanka ama waxay leedahay syntax khaldan: $1
translate-checks-escape: Calaamadda baxsasho ee soo socota {{PLURAL:$2|xaraf|xarfo}} waxay u muuqataa mid aan ula kac ahayn: $1. {{PLURAL:$4|Calaamad sax ah oo baxsasho ah waa|Calaamadaha baxsasho saxda ah waxaa ka mid ah:}} $3.
translate-checks-parametersnotequal: Tirada xuduudaha waa {{PLURAL:$1|$1}}; waa in ay noqotaa {{PLURAL:$2|$2}}.
translate-checks-fudforum-syntax: Isticmaal <nowiki>$1</nowiki> halkii aad ka isticmaali lahayd <nowiki>$2</nowiki> mashruucan.
translate-checks-newline-missing-start: Waxaa jira {{PLURAL:$1|waa}} khad cusub ah oo ka maqan {{PLURAL:$1|xaraf|$1 xarafo}} bilowga tarjumaadda.
translate-checks-newline-missing-end: Waxaa jira {{PLURAL:$1|waa}} khad cusub ah oo ka maqan {{PLURAL:$1|xaraf|$1 xarafo}} dhammaadka turjumaadda.
translate-checks-newline-extra-start: Waxaa jira {{PLURAL:$1|waa}} khad cusub ah {{PLURAL:$1|xaraf|$1 xarafo}} oo dheeraad ah bilowga turjumaadda.
translate-checks-newline-extra-end: Waxaa jira {{PLURAL:$1|waa}} khad cusub ah oo dheeraad ah  {{PLURAL:$1|xaraf|$1 xarafo}} dhammaadka turjumaadda.
translate-checks-value-not-present: Tarjumaaddu waa inay la mid noqotaa {{PLURAL:$2|hal qiime|mid ka mid ah qiimayaasha soo socda:}} $1.
translate-checks-replacement: Isticmaal $2 halkii aad ka isticmaali lahayd $1.
translate-checks-empty: Turjumaada aan wax ku jirin ama kaliya meel bannaan lama oggola.
right-translate: Wax ka beddel adiga oo isticmaalaya isdhexgalka turjumaada
action-translate: wax ka beddel adiga oo isticmaalaya isdhexgalka turjumaada
right-translate-import: Soo dhoofso turjumaadaha qad la'aanta ah
action-translate-import: soo dhoofso turjumaadaha qad la'aanta ah
right-translate-groupreview: Beddel heerka qulqulka shaqada ee kooxaha fariimaha
action-translate-groupreview: beddel heerka qulqulka shaqada ee kooxaha fariimaha
translate-rcfilters-translations-only-de: Turjumaadaha waxaa loo gudbiyay kooxaha farriimaha.
translate-rcfilters-translations-filter-: Wax kasta marka laga reebo turjumaadaha waxaa loo gudbiyay kooxaha farriimaha.
Wax kasta marka laga reebo isbeddellada lagu sameeyo bogagga tarjumaadda.
translate-rcfilters-translations-site-de: Isbeddellada lagu sameeyo farriimaha ku qoran luuqadda goobta.
translate-rc-translation-filter-site: Isbeddellada lagu sameeyo farriimaha ku qoran luuqadda goobta
translate-statsf-intro: Waxaad ku soo saari kartaa tirakoob fudud adigoo isticmaalaya foomkan. Dhammaan qiimayaasha waxay leeyihiin xad sare iyo xad hoose.
translate-statsf-unknown-error: Khalad aan la aqoon ayaa dhacay.
translate-statsf-error-message: Waxaa dhacay khalad marka la soo gelinayay garaafka: $1
translate-statsf-graph-alt-text-info: Beddelka qoraalka tirakoobka tarjumaadda waxa uu ku jiraa shaxda xogta ee hoose.
translate-statsf-alt-text: Tani waa qoraalka beddelka ah ee tirakoobka turjumaadda.
translate-statsf-embed: Koodhka lagu dhex gelinayo garaafka tirakoobka turjumaadda bogag kale.
translate-tag-page-wikipage-desc: [[$1|Turjumaad]] ee bogga wiki-ga [[$2]] ee laga turjumay <bdi>$3</bdi> ($4) loona turjumay <bdi>$5</bdi> ($6)
translations-summary: Geli magaca farriinta hoos si aad u muujiso dhammaan tarjumaadaha la heli karo.
translate-translations-no-message: “$1” ma aha farriin la turjumi karo
translate-translations-including-no-para: Fadlan sheeg furaha farriin sax ah gudaha xuduudaha bog hoosaad
languagestats-summary: Boggaan waxaa lagu soo bandhigay tirakoobka turjumaadda qayba kasta oo ka mid ah fariimaha luaqadaha.
messagegroupstats-summary: Boggan wuxuu muujinayaa tirakoobka kooxaha farriimaha.
translate-langstats-incomplete: Qaar ka mid ah tirakoobyada boggan ma dhammaystirna. Fadlan dib u soo rar si aad u hesho tirakoobyo dheeraad ah.
translate-suppress-complete: Gabi ahaanba qari qaybaha qoraalada turjuman
translate-ls-noempty: Gabi ahaanba qari qaybaha qoraalada aan la turjumin
translate-mgs-noempty: Ha muujin luuqadaha aan lahayn wax tarjumaad ah
translate-mgs-message-prefix-limit: Horgalaha farriinta la doortay wuxuu leeyahay in ka badan $1 {{PLURAL:$1|farriin|farriimo}}. Raadinta tiro badan oo farriimo ah waa gaabis. Fadlan sii hagaaji raadintaada.
translate-mgs-nothing: Ma jiraan wax tirakoob ah oo la muujin karo.
translate-mgs-invalid-entity: Kooxda farriinta ama horgalaha la doortay lama helin
translate-tes-server-error: Waa ku guuldarreysatay in la soo saaro talooyinka raadinta
translate-tes-type-to-search: Ku qor si aad u bilowdo raadinta
supportedlanguages-summary:
Boggan wuxuu muujinayaa liiska luqadaha firfircoon ee {{SITENAME}},  
iyo sidoo kale magacyada turjumayaasha ka shaqaynaya luqad kasta.  
Magaca turjumaanku wuu ka weynaanayaa marka turjumaanku sameeyo wax ka beddel badan.  
Midabka hoosta xarriiqda wuxuu muujinayaa sida dhow ee turjumaanku u firfircoonaa halkan.
supportedlanguages-colorlegend: Sharaxaadda midabka: Turjumaaddii ugu dambeysay $1 maalmood kahor.
supportedlanguages-activity: $1: $2 {{PLURAL:$2|wax ka beddel|wax ka beddello}} - wax ka beddelkii ugu dambeeyay $3 {{PLURAL:$3|maalin|maalmo}} kahor
translate-activelanguages-invalid-code: Koodhka luqadda “$1” lama yaqaan ama lama hawlgelin turjumaad ahaan.
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-translate-: Qoraalka asalka ah ee unugga tarjumaadda ($1)
translate-smg-notallowed: Laguma oggola in la fuliyo ficilkan.
translate-smg-submitted: Qeexitaannada farriimaha waa la cusboonaysiiyay. Isbeddellada waxaa lagu farsameynayaa gadaal.
translate-smg-submitted-with-failure: Cusboonaysiinta farriinta{{PLURAL:$1|qeexidda|qeexitaannada}} waxay ku guuldarreysatay kooxaha soo socda - $2. $3
translate-smg-submitted-others-processin: Qeexitaannada farriimaha ee kooxaha kale waxaa lagu farsameynayaa gadaal.
translate-smg-more: Waxaa jiri doona isbeddello dheeraad ah oo la farsameynayo kadib marka la gudbiyo isbeddelladan.
translate-smg-rename-select-err: Fadlan dooro farriin la doonayo in magaca la beddelo
translate-smg-changeset-modified: Isbeddellada waxaa wax ka beddelay isticmaale ama hab kale. Isbeddelladaada lama daabici karo sababtoo ah waxay ka dulqaban karaan kuwa kale. Fadlan dib u soo rar bogga si aad u aragto isbeddellada ugu dambeeyay.
translate-smg-no-groups-in-sync: Hadda ma jiraan kooxo isku xiran
translate-smg-groups-in-sync-list: Liiska kooxaha hadda lagu farsameynayo gadaal:
translate-smg-groups-with-error-title: Kooxo khaladaad ka dhacay intii lagu jiray isku dubbaridka
translate-smg-groups-with-error-desc: Liiska kooxaha iyo farriimahooda khaladaad ka dhacay intii lagu jiray isku dubbaridka:
translate-smg-group-sync-error-warn: Kooxdan waxaa ka dhacay khalad intii lagu jiray isku dubbaridka. Fadlan sax khaladaadka ka hor inta aanad farsameyn kooxdan.
translate-smg-unknown-error: Khalad aan la aqoon ayaa dhacay intii lagu shaqaynayay codsigaaga.
translate-manage-nochanges: Kooxdan ma jiraan isbeddello ku yimid qeexitaannada farriimaha.
translate-manage-nochanges-other:
Ma jiraan isbeddello ku yimid luqaddan.  
Isticmaal xiriirka hoose si aad ugu noqoto aragtida faahfaahinta kooxda.
translate-manage-inconsistent:
Iswaafaq la'aan ayaa laga helay codsiga.  
Fadlan hubi isbeddellada oo isku day mar kale.  
Faahfaahin: $1.
translate-manage-toolong:
Waqtiga ugu badan ee farsamaynta $1 {{PLURAL:$1|ilbiriqsi|ilbiriqsiyo}} waa la dhaafay.  
Fadlan dib u gudbi foomka si aad u sii wadato farsamaynta.
translate-manage-import-summary: Waxaa laga soo gelinayaa nooc cusub oo ka yimid il dibadeed
translate-manage-import-rename-summary: Waxaa dib loogu magacaabay il dibadeed
translate-manage-conflict-summary:
Waxaa laga soo gelinayaa nooc cusub oo ka yimid il dibadeed.  
Fadlan hubi.
translate-manage-intro-other:
Hoos waxaa ku qoran liiska isbeddellada tarjumaadda ee luqadda $1.  
Fadlan dib u eeg isbeddellada oo dooro ficil aad ku sameyso mid kasta oo cusboonaysiin ah.  
Haddii aad doorato in aad iska indho tirto isbeddellada, ficilkaas waa mid ku meelgaar ah oo kaliya.
translate-manage-import-done: Waxaa si guul leh loo dhammaystiray soo dhoofinta $3 turjumaada ee kooxda [[Special:Translate/$1|$2]]!
translate-manage-key-reused: Farriintan hore ayay uga jirtaa wiki-ga. Hubi haddii si lama filaan ah loo isticmaalay furihii hore.
translate-import-err-invalid-title: Magaca feylka ee la bixiyay <nowiki>$1</nowiki> sax ma ahan.
translate-import-err-no-such-file: Feylka <nowiki>$1</nowiki> ma jiro ama si maxalli ah looma soo gajin.
translate-import-err-stale-group: Kooxda fariimaha ee uu feylkani ka tirsan yahay ma jirto.
translate-import-err-no-headers:
Feylku ma ahan feyl Gettext oo si sax ah u samaysan oo ku jira qaabka kordhinta Translate:
Waa laga yaabaa in la go'aamin waayo kooxda fariimaha iyo luuqadda laga helayo madaxyada feylka.
translate-import-err-gettext-parse-faile: Faylku ma aha Gettext si sax ah loo qaabeeyey: $1
translate-js-support-unsaved-warning: Waxaad haysaa turjumaado aan weli la daabicin.
translate-searchprofile-note: Ikhtiyaarro dheeraad ah oo raadinta ayaa laga heli karaa [$1 raadinta tarjumaadda].
log-description-translationreview: Diiwaanka dhammaan dib u eegista tarjumaadaha iyo kooxaha farriimaha.
logentry-translationreview-group: $1 {{GENDER:$2|beddelay}} xaaladda $4 tarjumaado ee $3 laga beddelay $6 loona beddelay $7
logentry-translationreview-unfuzzy: $1 {{GENDER:$2|ku calaamadeeyay}} turjumaadda $3 in aanay sii ahayn mid duug ah
right-unfuzzy: Calaamadee unugyada tarjumaadda in aanay sii ahayn kuwo duug ah
action-unfuzzy: Calaamadee unugyada turjumaadda in aanay sii ahayn kuwo duug ah
translate-unfuzzy-comment: Unugga tarjumaadda waxaa loo calaamadeeyay in uusan sii ahayn mid duug ah, iyada oo aan wax isbeddel ah jirin
right-translate-sandboxaction: Fuli tallaabooyinka loo oggol yahay isticmaaleyaasha bacaadka
action-translate-sandboxaction: Fuli tallaabooyinka loo oggol yahay isticmaaleyaasha bacaadka
translate-workflow-autocreated-summary: Abuuris otomaatig ah oo bog loogu sameynayo xaaladda socodka shaqada $1
translate-workflowgroup-desc:
Fariintan kooxdu waxay muujinaysaa xaaladaha socodka shaqada turjumaadda.  
Xaaladahan waxaa lagu qeexay doorsoomaha qaabeynta $wgTranslateWorkflowStates.
translate-dynagroup-recent-desc:
Kooxdan farriimaha waxay muujinaysaa dhammaan tarjumaadaha ugu dambeeyay ee lagu sameeyay luqaddan.  
Waxay si gaar ah faa’iido ugu leedahay hawlaha dib u eegista.
translate-dynagroup-additions-desc: Kooxdan farriimaha waxay muujinaysaa farriimaha cusub iyo kuwa la beddelay.
tux-subscription-error: Lama cusboonaysiin liiska kooxaha la socodka
tux-save-unknown-error: Khalad aan la aqoon ayaa dhacay.
tux-editor-shortcut-info: Riix "$1" si aad u xaqiijiso oo aad ugu gudubto farriinta xigta, "$2" si aad uga boodo, "$4" si aad u bixiso soo koobid ama u hayso "$3" si aad u aragto gaagaabyada kale.
tux-editor-need-more-help: Ma u baahan tahay caawimo dheeraad ah?
tux-editor-outdated-notice: Turjumaaddan waxaa laga yaabaa inay u baahan tahay in la cusboonaysiiyo.
tux-empty-list-all-guide: Dooro koox farriimo kale oo la turjumo
tux-translate-page-no-such-group: Kooxda la tilmaamay ma jirto. Dooro koox farriimo kale.
tux-empty-no-messages-to-display: Ma jiraan farriimo la soo bandhigo.
tux-empty-there-are-optional: Waxaa jira farriimo ikhtiyaari ah oo aan lagu soo bandhigin liiska
tux-empty-nothing-to-proofread: Wax dib loo eego ma jiro
tux-empty-you-can-help-providing: Waxaad caawin kartaa bixinta turjumaado cusub
tux-empty-nothing-new-to-proofread: Wax cusub oo la dib u eego ma jiro
tux-empty-you-can-review-already-proofre: Waxaad dib u eegi kartaa turjumaadaha ay hore u dib u eegeen dadka kale.
tux-empty-list-other-guide: Waxaad caawin kartaa dib u eegista turjumaadaha jira
tux-editor-loading-failed: Waa fashilantay in la soo raro caawimaadaha turjumaadda: $1
translate-statsbar-tooltip-with-fuzzy: $1% la turjumay, $2% la dib loo eegay, $3% duugoobay
tux-session-expired: Adiga lama gelin. Fadlan ku gal tab kale. Haddii kale, nuqul ka samee tarjumaadaha aan la keydin, ku gal, ka dibna ku soo noqo boggan oo mar kale geli turjumaadahaaga.
tux-nojs: Qalabkani ma shaqeeyo la’aanta JavaScript. JavaScript waa la damiyay, wuu fashilmay, ama biraawsarkan lama taageero.
translate-messagebundle-error-parsing: Khalad ayaa dhacay marka la falanqeynayay JSON: $1
translate-messagebundle-error-invalid-ar: Xirmada farriimaha waa inay noqotaa JSON object. Waxaa la helay nooca $1
translate-messagebundle-error-key-empty: Xirmada farriimaha waa inaanay ku jirin fure madhan
translate-messagebundle-error-key-too-lo: Furaha "$1" aad buu u dheer yahay
translate-messagebundle-error-key-invali: Furaha "$1" waxa ku jira xarfo aan la oggolayn
translate-messagebundle-error-metadata-t: Metadata waa in ay noqotaa liis.
translate-messagebundle-error-invalid-me: Qaybta metadata waxay ka kooban tahay furaha aan la aqoon: "$1". Furayaasha la taageerayo waa $2.
translate-messagebundle-error-invalid-pr: Koodhka {{PLURAL:$2|luuqad|luuqado}} mudnaan aan sax ahayn ayaa ku jira metadata: $1
Qaabka luqadaha mudnaanta ee metadata waa khaldan. Luuqadaha mudnaanta waa inay noqdaan liis ka kooban xarfo.
translate-messagebundle-error-invalid-de: Sharaxaadda xirmada farriinta ee metadata waa khalad. Sharaxaaddu waa inay noqotaa xaraf
translate-messagebundle-error-invalid-la: Sharaxaadda xirmada farriinta ee metadata waa khalad. Sharaxaaddu waa inay noqotaa xaraf
translate-messagebundle-group-descriptio: Farriimaha xirmada farriimaha waxaa lagu qeexay bogga [[$2|$1]].
translate-messagebundle-change-sourcelan: Dejinta luuqadda isha ee xirmada farriimaha sida ku qeexan metadata.
translate-messagebundle-sourcelanguage-c: Luuqadda isha ee xirmada farriimaha lama beddeli karo marka mar la abuuro.
translate-error-association-failure: farriimaha {{PLURAL:$2|koox|kooxo}} lama xiriirin karo kooxda isku dhafka ah: $1
translate-error-invalid-aggregategroup: Sax ma ahan kooxda farriimaha isku dhafka ah $1
translate-error-aggregategroup-source-la: Kooxda {{PLURAL:$3|$1 kuma|$1 kuuma}} laha luuqadda isha ee la mid ah kooxda isku dhafka ah ($2).
translate-error-duplicate-aggregategroup: Koox farriimo isku-dhafan oo leh magaca $1 hore ayay u jirtaa.
log-action-filter-translationreview-mess: Dib u eegista farriimaha tarjumaadda ee shaqsi ahaaneed
log-action-filter-translationreview-unfu: Dib u eegista tarjumaadaha farriimaha shaqsiyeed si loo calaamadeeyo inay yihiin kuwo casri ah
log-action-filter-import-translatable-bu: Soo gelinta xirmada la turjumi karo
echo-category-title-translate-message-gr: Diiwaangelinta kooxaha farriimaha la turjumi karo
echo-pref-tooltip-translate-message-grou: I ogeysii isbeddellada ku yimaada kooxaha farriimaha la turjumi karo ee aan ku qoranahay
namespaceinfo-description-ns1198: Meel magac waxa uu ka kooban yahay unugyo tarjumaad, kuwaas oo ah qaybo shaqsi ah oo la turjumi karo ama la turjumay oo ka mid ah [[Special:PageTranslation|bogagga la turjumi karo]] iyo [[mw:Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:Translate/Message Bundles|xirmooyinka farriimaha]]
